expectations.text: Recommends a well-reasoned primary design pattern (Strategy or Abstract Factory both acceptable)
expectations.evidence: Recommends Abstract Factory with clear reasoning about product families and renderer consistency requirements.

expectations.text: Explains why the recommended pattern fits
expectations.evidence: Explains coordinated families of renderers, enforced compatibility, and extensibility.
'Adding a new format means adding one new factory class without touching existing code (Open/Closed Principle).'

expectations.text: Provides a structural sketch — interface + concrete implementations
expectations.evidence: Provides ASCII diagram with ExporterFactory, concrete factories (PdfExporterFactory etc.), and renderer interfaces.

expectations.text: Mentions at least one alternative pattern and explains the tradeoff
expectations.evidence: Discusses Template Method (fixed skeleton, coupled hierarchy), Strategy (single algorithm, doesn't handle multi-part), and Builder (complement, not solution).

expectations.text: Response is language-agnostic or uses pseudocode
expectations.evidence: Provides a full Python implementation with from abc import ABC, @abstractmethod, List typing — language-specific rather than language-agnostic.
